import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('/content/drive/MyDrive/Placement_Data.csv')
print(df)

print(placed_count)

status

Not Placed     67

Histogram distribution plot for eligibility Test

In [ ]:
''' Histogram distribution plot for eligibility Test'''
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 10))
sns.histplot(df['etest_p'], bins=12, color='teal',kde=True)
plt.title('Histogram Distribution Plot for Eligibility Test')
plt.xlabel('Eligibility Test Score')
plt.ylabel('Frequency')
Out[ ]:
Text(0, 0.5, 'Frequency')

Finding which columns have highest correlation with each other

In [ ]:
'''Finding which columns have highest correlation with each other'''
correlation_matrix = df.corr(numeric_only=True)
plt.figure(figsize=(10,8))
sns.heatmap(correlation_matrix, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', linewidths=0.5)
plt.show()
In [ ]:
sns.regplot (x='ssc_p', y = 'degree_p', data = df, line_kws= {"color" :"red"})
plt.title('Relation between SSC and degree percentages"')
plt.xlabel('SSC Percentage')
plt.ylabel('Degree Percentage')
plt.show()

BoxPlot Visualization of Students Degree Percentage and their specialization in Higher Secondary Education

In [ ]:
'''BoxPlot Visualization of Students Degree Percentage versus specialization in Higher Secondary Education'''
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.boxplot(x='degree_p', y='hsc_s', data=df)
plt.title('BoxPlot Visualization of Students Degree Percentage versus specialization in Higher Secondary Education')
plt.xlabel('Degree Percentage')
plt.ylabel('Specialization in Higher Secondary Education')
plt.xticks(rotation=45)
plt.show()

Plot a graph between Secondary Education percentage and Higher Secondary Education percentage and categorize them based on the employment status. (hue = 'status')

In [ ]:
'''Plot a graph between Secondary Education percentage and Higher Secondary Education percentage and categorize them based on the employment status. (hue = 'status')'''
Out[ ]:
"Plot a graph between Secondary Education percentage and Higher Secondary Education percentage and categorize them based on the employment status. (hue = 'status')"
In [ ]:
'''Creating a scatter plot between Secondary Education percentage and Higher Secondary Education percentage and categorize them based on the employment status. (hue = 'status')'''
plt.figure(figsize=(10,6))
sns.scatterplot(x='ssc_p', y='hsc_p', data=df, hue='status')
plt.title('Scatter Plot between Secondary Education percentage and Higher Secondary Education percentage and categorize them based on the employment status')
plt.xlabel('Secondary Education Percentage')
plt.ylabel('Higher Secondary Education Percentage')
plt.show()

Creating a LMplot with respect to scatter plot created

In [ ]:
'''Creating a LMplot with respect to scatter plot between Secondary Education percentage and Higher Secondary Education percentage and categorize them based on the employment status. (hue = 'status')'''
g = sns.lmplot(x='ssc_p', y='hsc_p', data=df, hue='status', height=5, aspect=1.5)
g.set_axis_labels('Secondary Education Percentage', 'Higher Secondary Education Percentage')
plt.show()

Count Plot of degree percentage with hue as status

In [ ]:
'''Count Plot of degree percentage with hue as status'''
plt.figure(figsize=(15, 10))
sns.countplot(x='degree_p', data=df, hue='status')
plt.title('Count Plot of degree percentage with hue as status')
plt.xlabel('Degree Percentage')
plt.ylabel('Count')
plt.show()

Creating a Layered Histogram with Kernel Density Estimate plot

In [ ]:
'''Creating a Layered Histogram with Kernel Density Estimate plot for degree percentage with hue as status'''
plt.figure(figsize=(15,8))
sns.histplot(data=df, x='degree_p', hue='status', kde=True)
plt.title('Layered Histogram with Kernel Density Estimate plot for degree percentage with hue as status')
plt.xlabel('Degree Percentage')
plt.ylabel('Count')
plt.show()

Creating a Layered Histogram with Kernel Density Estimate plot for Secondary Education percentage with hue as status

In [ ]:
'''Creating a Layered Histogram with Kernel Density Estimate plot for Secondary Education percentage with hue as status'''
plt.figure(figsize=(15,8))
sns.histplot(data=df, x='ssc_p', hue='status', kde=True)
plt.title('Layered Histogram with Kernel Density Estimate plot for Secondary Education percentage with hue as status')
plt.xlabel('Secondary Education Percentage')
plt.ylabel('Count')
plt.show()

Box Plots of degree percentage of all the disciplines categorized for placed and not placed students.

Plot a hexplot (use jointplot() with kind='hex') for degree percentage and Secondary Education percentage.

In [ ]:
'''Plot a hexplot (use jointplot() with kind='hex') for degree percentage and Secondary Education percentage.'''
sns.jointplot(x='ssc_p', y='degree_p', data=df, kind='hex')
plt.show()

Create a Distribution Plot (Histogram) for Employability Test percentage.

In [ ]:
'''Create a Distribution Plot (Histogram) for Employability Test percentage.'''
plt.figure(figsize=(15,8))
sns.histplot(data=df, x='etest_p', kde=True)
plt.title('Distribution Plot (Histogram) for Employability Test percentage')
plt.xlabel('Employability Test Percentage')
plt.ylabel('Count')
plt.show()
